action.reasoning: Observation: after two long neural training attempts the hidden exprate remains 0 and only ~1h remains. Analysis: continuing the slow seq2seq model is unlikely to reach exact-expression accuracy in time; a retrieval fallback using compact visual features from labeled train/val data can produce valid LaTeX and may recover exact matches/near-duplicates or simple expressions. Decision: build a compact nearest-neighbor label database from train+val images, patch predict.py to use retrieval by default with optional neural fallback disabled, then submit immediately.
action.command: python build_retrieval.py --out checkpoints/retrieval_db.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output /tmp/preds.json
